title: L'ebreo errante
writer: Eugène Sue, Giovan Battista Angioletti, Goffredo Alessandrini
actors: Vittorio Gassman, Valentina Cortese, Inga Gort
plot: Matthew, a rich nationalist Jew and a contemporary of Jesus, regards the latter as an obstacle in this struggle to free their people from the Roman yoke by means of revolt. He incites the people against Jesus and prevents his own ...
